testcase.name: test_login_with_owner_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain token assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI1YjA5MjVmYS02NDJjLTRjZjQtYTRhMy0xNDJiZTg0YjFkYTgiLCJlbWFpbCI6Im93bmVyQGJsdWVsb3R1cy5haSIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjIwNjQwMSwiaWF0IjoxNzcxNjAxNjAxfQ.SGRe3yq6rjHs1mObZOABUWVNQ-VM74lzZ_A2bjpbQ-o', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'avatar': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-19T13:49:35.919791Z', 'credits': {'bonus': 100, 'bonus_total': 10, 'last_bonus_refresh': '2026-02-19T13:49:52.392647Z', 'monthly': 1000, ...}, 'email': 'owner@bluelotus.ai', ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_blue_lotus_features.py:26: in test_login_with_owner_credentials assert "token" in data, "Response should contain token" E AssertionError: Response should contain token E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI1YjA5MjVmYS02NDJjLTRjZjQtYTRhMy0xNDJiZTg0YjFkYTgiLCJlbWFpbCI6Im93bmVyQGJsdWVsb3R1cy5haSIsImV4cCI6MTc3MjIwNjQwMSwiaWF0IjoxNzcxNjAxNjAxfQ.SGRe3yq6rjHs1mObZOABUWVNQ-VM74lzZ_A2bjpbQ-o', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'avatar': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-19T13:49:35.919791Z', 'credits': {'bonus': 100, 'bonus_total': 10, 'last_bonus_refresh': '2026-02-19T13:49:52.392647Z', 'monthly': 1000, ...}, 'email': 'owner@bluelotus.ai', ...}}

testcase.name: test_list_backend_providers
testcase.failure: tests/test_blue_lotus_features.py:196: in test_list_backend_providers assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
